seoTitle: Old Guildford vs Old Mill — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Old Guildford and Old Mill. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Old Guildford vs Old Mill: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Old Guildford and Old Mill.
heading: Old Guildford vs Old Mill — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Old Guildford, New South Wales and Old Mill, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Old Mill has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Old Guildford (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Old Guildford or Old Mill safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Old Guildford has a flood risk score of 51/100, while Old Mill scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Old Guildford scores 25/100 for bushfire risk. Old Mill scores 60/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Old Guildford or Old Mill?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Old Mill has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.52% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
